goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'west' and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The restaurant should serve 'british' food.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'thursday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 14:30' and should depart from 'stevenage'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the west and should be in the expensive price range
The restaurant should serve british food
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on thursday and should go to cambridge
The train should arrive by 14:30 and should depart from stevenage
Make sure you get train ID and departure time
